name: worldcup-prediction-platform
description: FIFA World Cup AI prediction and analytics web platform

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.db:init: npm run prisma:generate --prefix server && npm run prisma:migrate --prefix server && npm run db:seed --prefix server
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
